name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: In Baltimore, MD at 424 E 33rd Street, First Cash Pawn offers quick pawn loans and gold buying.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn's Baltimore location sits at 424 E 33rd Street in Baltimore, MD, operating as a standalone pawn shop serving the east Baltimore community. The shop is open Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 6 PM, making it convenient for weekday visits and Saturday errands.

This Baltimore pawn shop offers flexible cash loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and other valuables, as well as buying gold and silver directly. Call (410) 235-7296 to discuss your items, get a quote, or ask about current rates—the team is ready to work with you on competitive terms.

If you need quick cash in Baltimore without a credit check, bring a valid photo ID and the item you'd like to pawn or sell. First Cash Pawn handles pawn loans fairly and lets you reclaim items within the agreed timeframe.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 states and international markets, making services widely accessible
Fast cash access with no credit checks required, suitable for credit-constrained consumers
Non-recourse pawn loans mean creditors cannot pursue personal assets beyond the pledged collateral
Diverse merchandise buying program (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) with regulatory oversight and financial transparency
Additional services beyond pawn loans including gold buying, layaway plans, and retail merchandise sales
Technology-driven operations through subsidiary AFF providing 15,000+ retail partner payment solutions
cons: Risk of losing pledged items if pawn loans are not repaid by the redemption deadline
Interest rates and fees vary by state regulation, potentially creating inconsistent borrowing costs across locations
Requires physical collateral of sufficient value, excluding consumers without valuable assets to pledge
Pawn loans may have shorter terms than traditional personal loans, creating pressure to repay quickly
Limited transparency on the website regarding specific APR rates, fees, and redemption periods
best_for: Credit-constrained consumers needing emergency cash without credit checks or income verification
Individuals with valuable personal items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to pledge collateral temporarily
People seeking fast same-day or next-day cash without the lengthy approval process of traditional lenders
Consumers who may resell items or have items they don't immediately need and can afford to lose temporarily
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for credit-constrained consumers who need emergency cash quickly and have valuable personal items to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that failure to repay the pawn loan by the redemption deadline results in loss of the pledged item, and customers should carefully understand state-specific terms, interest rates, and fees before entering into any loan agreement.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments)
Retail sales of used merchandise from pawn operations
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying with cash payment on the spot
Layaway services with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own payment solutions through 15,000+ retail merchant partners (AFF subsidiary)
Retail finance payment solutions through merchant partner networks
Merchandise buying across diverse categories (sporting goods, musical instruments, etc.)
Store locator and inventory search services
Pawn FAQs and educational resources about pawn loan processes
Consumer privacy protection and terms of service documentation
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 424 E 33rd St, Baltimore, MD. Quick pawn loans and gold buying.
